text.tspan: mausam@github
---[ Top Projects & Repositories ]----------------------
📦 Leet-Code
A comprehensive collection of LeetCode problem solutions featuring
implementations in Python, C++, and Java. Covers essential data
structures (arrays, trees, graphs, heaps) and algorithms (dynamic
programming, recursion, backtracking, binary search, sliding window,
two pointers) to help with coding interview preparation and
competitive programming.
💻 908 Commits | 📝 13,291 LOC | 🚀 Java
📦 Mausam04
Fourth iteration of my personal portfolio website showcasing projects,
skills, and professional experience. Built with modern React framework
featuring smooth GSAP animations, responsive design, dark mode
support, and SEO optimization to create an impressive online presence.
💻 87 Commits | 📝 24,034 LOC | 🚀 TypeScript
📦 Campus-Sync
Comprehensive campus management platform developed for Project
Exhibition 2025. Features student information management, event
scheduling, attendance tracking, resource booking, and real-time
notifications to streamline campus operations and enhance student
experience.
💻 51 Commits | 📝 73,567 LOC | 🚀 TypeScript
📦 NexPulse
Self-hostable event analytics engine. Ingests 100k+ events/sec using
Go, Redis, and Kafka, featuring sliding-window rate limits, O(1)
unique counts, and live anomaly detection.
💻 24 Commits | 📝 3,930 LOC | 🚀 Python
